*Pandas pivot_table*

рҹ“– *CASE STUDY*
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
*Bezos's regret minimization*
In 1994, Bezos left a $1M/year Wall Street job to sell books online. His framework: imagine yourself at 80 looking back. Would you regret not trying? He said yes вҖ” and quit the same week. *Fear of failure often disguises itself as prudence.*

*Soros breaks the Bank of England*
In 1992, Soros shorted ВЈ10B of British pounds and made $1B in a day. He saw a structural imbalance the market ignored. Lesson: *When you're right, be confident enough to make it count. Sizing matters as much as being right.*
